metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Choose the level of resume delivery workflow you need.

plans.label: Pricing
plans.title: Three ways to package the fixed-template resume workflow
plans.description: The product roadmap supports individual candidates, expert operators, and studio teams. This page now describes the intended plan structure without wiring payment checkout yet.

items.title: Starter
items.description: For individual candidates who need a clean fixed-template workflow.
items.tip: Best for a single resume package and one target role.

items.title: Professional
items.description: For users who want multiple tailored versions from one base resume.
items.label: Recommended
items.tip: Best for repeat applications and iterative JD testing.

items.title: Studio
items.description: For coaches or delivery teams handling multiple candidates with fixed templates.
items.tip: Best for operating a template-driven resume service.
